scenario: Lead tried melasma treatment at another clinic, saw no results, and doubts anything will work

turns.content: i already did pico laser somewhere else for my melasma but saw zero results leh. does this even work or not?

mustAsk: how many sessions they did or what was used at the previous clinic
shouldDo: set honest expectations without promising outcomes

turns.content: so can you guarantee it will clear this time or not?

mustDo: suggest a consultation to assess the skin properly

scenario: Lead is skeptical that HIFU actually does anything for jawline tightening

turns.content: HIFU ni betul2 works ke? rasa macam buang duit je, tighten muka konon

mustAsk: which area they want to tighten or their main concern
shouldDo: acknowledge the doubt without being defensive

turns.content: ok but boleh promise tak hasil dia nampak? kalau tak nampak buat apa

mustDo: explain outcomes depend on the individual and skin condition
offer a consultation to set realistic expectations

scenario: Lead spent a lot on acne scar treatment before with no improvement and feels it is a waste of money

turns.content: spent like 2k on subcision and laser for my acne scars before, never improve at all. waste money sia. why should i believe this works?

mustAsk: what type of scarring they have or how many sessions they completed

turns.content: just tell me straight, can you guarantee my scars will go or not

mustDo: be clear that no honest clinic guarantees results
recommend a consultation to assess scar type and suitability

scenario: Lead had Botox elsewhere, felt it made no difference to her forehead lines, and demands assurance

turns.content: i did botox dahi before but tak nampak beza langsung. does it actually work or just hype?

mustAsk: how long ago the previous Botox was or the dosage used
shouldDo: explain results depend on dosage, area and individual response

turns.content: so this time confirm nampak result tak? kalau tak jangan buang masa la

mustDo: suggest a consultation with the practitioner to review what happened before
shouldDo: stay honest and reassuring without overclaiming

scenario: Lead thinks HydraFacial is just a fancy normal facial and wants a guarantee before paying

turns.content: isnt hydrafacial just a atas facial? does it really do anything different anot

mustAsk: what their main skin concern is
shouldDo: address the doubt with honest framing

turns.content: can you guarantee my skin will glow after or not? if not i dun want

mustDo: explain results vary and cannot be guaranteed
offer a consultation to recommend the right option
shouldDo: keep the tone friendly and low-pressure
